analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights the Classical Gardens of Suzhou as a UNESCO World Heritage Site, emphasizing traditional Chinese garden design and the cultural value of natural beauty. Evaluation: CH1 (West is immoral) – Not present; no comparison or criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Not present; no mention of international cooperation or multilateralism. CH3 (China has an epic history) – Partially historical reference but no adversity/resilience theme; not applicable. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – Not addressed; no political system or governance claims. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – Not addressed; no governance or development achievements cited. CH6 (China is interesting in culture, nature, heritage) – Yes; the tweet promotes Chinese cultural heritage and traditions via UNESCO recognition. Conclusion: Only CH6 is promoted.
